## Title: Fix unreachable code in LDPC encoder due to incorrect conditional include logic

### Summary
The NR LDPC encoder contained unreachable code in the Zc=224 codepath due to incorrect conditional compilation logic. Both `ldpc224_byte.c` (AVX2 implementation) and `ldpc224_byte_128.c` (SSE implementation) were unconditionally included in `ldpc_encode_parity_check.c`, but each file contains preprocessor guards that prevent compilation under opposing build configurations. This resulted in one
